scientific_question: Can a pre-treatment, decision-level trace signal (exact line-level redundancy in the newest tool observation) identify when segment-local LINEDEDUP causally improves execution utility?
decision_unit: one task-level decision opportunity; <=1 randomized experimental event per task (single-shot, newest observation, first available call)
treatment: segment-local LINEDEDUP (remove newest-obs lines whose stripped form appears in a prior obs; prefix byte-identical)
control: NO_OP (byte-identical body after identical transport normalization applied to BOTH arms)

base_availability.note: NO dup_frac>0.40 requirement — dup_frac is a continuous moderator

primary_moderator.centering: median dup_frac of pre-experiment C0 available events (frozen before outcome analysis)

randomization.persistence: append-only randomization_state.jsonl + task_state.jsonl; reconstructed on startup; conflict->abort

secondary_outcomes: h3 rework proxies (calls, output_tokens, cache tokens, latency)
primary_estimand: ATE(LINEDEDUP - NO_OP) on effective_cost_h1 among available events (ITT)
interaction_model: Y = b0 + b1*A + b2*S + b3*A*S + block FE + [log(seg_chars), calls_so_far, repo FE]; A=LINEDEDUP, S=centered dup_frac; b3 = PRIMARY moderator parameter (negative => redundancy makes LINEDEDUP more favorable)
analysis: ITT primary (NOT conditioned on actual_changed); randomization-consistent diff + bootstrap CI + repo-clustered bootstrap + block-permutation inference; report point est + 95% CI + N + missingness + balance + effect size, NOT only p-values

controller_policies.evaluation: IPW + doubly-robust + block-aware CI + leave-one-repo-out cross-fit
controller_policies.support_rule: controller value SUPPORTED only if V(pi_signal) beats min[V(pi_keep),V(pi_static)] with credible CI + acceptable quality

missing_data_rule: a task with an infrastructure_failure (fail-closed 502) within its H=1 or H=3 window is EXCLUDED and classified BEFORE outcome analysis; exclusion logged, never silent; NEVER rerun a completed task for an unfavorable outcome

power.finding: UNDERPOWERED at feasible N for practically-relevant MDE; only very large effects detectable

stopping_rule: stop when 60 eligible randomized events reached OR all buildable pool tasks attempted; never on observed p-value/trend
prespecified_outcomes_acceptable: 2: moderates LINEDEDUP but no policy value
